prompt: Create a hyper-realistic full-body vertical fashion editorial portrait in a 9:16 aspect ratio, shot like a Vogue luxury streetwear café spread. The subject is a young woman with long dark brown hair sitting elegantly on a chair beside a large floor-to-ceiling glass window in a stylish modern city café. She is posed with one leg crossed over the other, her right elbow resting near her body with her hand touching her chin in a thoughtful fashion-model pose, and her left hand relaxed on the edge of a small round marble café table. Her face should be softly anonymized with a realistic rectangular blur/mask while preserving natural hair, head shape, and body proportions. Outfit: oversized black tailored blazer with subtle embroidered detailing on the sleeves, black luxury logo hoodie underneath, loose dark washed black jeans with a small distressed rip at one knee, and chunky black-white-beige designer sneakers. On the table to her right are exactly 2 visible items: a tall latte in a clear glass on a saucer and a beige monogram luxury handbag with black trim and gold hardware. The café interior includes exactly 4 background people, softly blurred: two seated customers on the right side, one barista/person working at the counter, and one person farther back near the counter. Include a softly blurred menu board, coffee equipment, warm pendant lights, pale tile floor, marble tabletop, black table base, and brown café chairs. Through the glass window on the left, show a rainy or overcast urban street with muted buildings, sidewalk reflections, and soft city blur. Use natural window light mixed with warm indoor café lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic lens perspective, high-end editorial color grading, crisp clothing textures, 8K detail, vertical composition, full-body framing from head to shoes. Avoid extra text, logos that are too legible, distorted hands, extra limbs, duplicate cups, or additional table objects.
